title: NSRI rescues man trapped on rocks at The Point
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Station 15 of the National...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Station 15 of the National Sea Rescue Institute (NSRI) in Mossel Bay helped rescue a 20-year-old man who was trapped on the rocks at The Point on Friday 29 August.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Station 15 of the National Sea Rescue Institute (NSRI) in Mossel Bay helped rescue a 20-year-old man who was trapped on the rocks at The Point on Friday 29 August."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At about 16:00 that afternoon, the NSRI responded to eyewitness reports of a young man on the rocks, offshore of The Point, Mossel Bay, appearing to be in distress.","html":"At about 16:00 that afternoon, the NSRI responded to eyewitness reports of a young man on the rocks, offshore of The Point, Mossel Bay, appearing to be in distress."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The man had found himself cut off from the mainland in the rising high tide.","html":"The man had found himself cut off from the mainland in the rising high tide."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to André Fraser, Station 15’s coxswain, it became evident that the rocks the man was on would soon become engulfed by the tide."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Alongside the NSRI, the SAPS, Mossel Bay’s Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management teams, the Western Cape Government’s Health Emergency Medical Services and the Water Policing and Diving Services were activated.","html":"Alongside the NSRI, the SAPS, Mossel Bay’s Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management teams, the Western Cape Government’s Health Emergency Medical Services and the Water Policing and Diving Services were activated."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Prepared with rescue ropes, an extra life jacket and additional protective equipment, the NSRI swimmers entered the waters.","html":"Prepared with rescue ropes, an extra life jacket and additional protective equipment, the NSRI swimmers entered the waters."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"They reached the man and secured him into the life jacket and protective gear. He was safely recovered and brought ashore."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It is believed he was suffering from hypothermia and was taken to the NSRI's rescue base where he was rewarmed, and later transported home.","html":"It is believed he was suffering from hypothermia and was taken to the NSRI's rescue base where he was rewarmed, and later transported home."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Watch a video of the rescue below: Video:  Hellen Shionning/Garden Route Travel.","html":"Watch a video of the rescue below: Video: Hellen Shionning/Garden Route Travel."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: NSRI rescues man trapped on rocks at The Point
